# AI FlowPal

AI FlowPal builds unique AI workflow systems for unique businesses. The service starts by mapping how each business actually works - customers, tools, team rules, approvals, and promises - then uses AI as leverage for monitoring, summaries, drafts, routing, evidence notes, and review queues while human judgment stays in control.

Website: https://aiflowpal.com/
Contact: hello@aiflowpal.com

Key pages:
- https://aiflowpal.com/ - unique AI systems for unique businesses
- https://aiflowpal.com/about/ - company profile and entity page for AI FlowPal custom AI workflow systems
- https://aiflowpal.com/ai-workflow-automation-for-small-business/ - small business workflow fit repair
- https://aiflowpal.com/customer-follow-up-automation/ - customer follow-up workflow repair
- https://aiflowpal.com/ai-automation-consultant-toronto/ - Toronto AI automation consulting
- https://aiflowpal.com/immigration-consultant-ai-workflow/ - admin workflow support for immigration consultants
- https://aiflowpal.com/travel-agency-ai-workflow/ - travel agency workflow support
- https://aiflowpal.com/real-estate-lead-follow-up-automation/ - real estate lead follow-up workflow support

Guardrail: AI FlowPal focuses on workflow/admin support with human approval. It does not provide legal, immigration, medical, tax, insurance, travel, or financial advice. External/customer-facing actions and sensitive decisions should stay human-reviewed.
